---
title: "API Reference"
---

## Overview

This section will document the main Python modules in `src/road_risk`.

::: {.callout-note}
Placeholder page. The final version can either link to generated API docs or
provide a curated module map.
:::

## Planned Content

- Ingestion modules.
- Cleaning and snapping modules.
- Feature engineering modules.
- Model modules.
- App and export utilities.
